sketches.mechanism: Default argument objects are evaluated once at function definition time and reused across calls.
sketches.resonance: What looked like a private empty place becomes a memory shared by every arrival.
sketches.draft:
def touch(x, kept=[]):
    kept.append(x)
    return kept

touch(0)
touch(1)

sketches.mechanism: Receiving from a nil channel blocks forever because no sender or close can ever arrive.
sketches.resonance: Waiting on an address that was never made turns patience into a permanent state.

sketches.mechanism: Limited types cannot be copied or assigned, so initializing one object from another is rejected.
sketches.resonance: Some things may exist, but cannot be duplicated without ceasing to obey the world.
